items.title: What is Ebola and why is stopping this outbreak so difficult?
items.dek: An outbreak of Ebola in DR Congo involves a rare strain and is in an area affected by conflict.
items.body: An outbreak of Ebola in DR Congo involves a rare strain and is in an area affected by conflict.

items.title: Bodies of missing Italian divers found in Maldives
items.dek: The bodies of all five Italian divers who died in the Maldives last week have now been found, officials tell the BBC.
items.body: The bodies of all five Italian divers who died in the Maldives last week have now been found, officials tell the BBC.
